message:
fix: 4 bugs — cross-project git_paths_removed leak, falsy-0 id checks, XSS in confirm, missing auth on archive tools

- Move git_paths_removed list inside per-project loop to prevent paths from
  project A contaminating project B's git index.remove() call
- Change `if not agent_id` / `if not project_id` to `is None` checks so
  a hypothetical id=0 is not incorrectly rejected as missing
- Escape agent name with tojson filter in onclick confirm to prevent XSS
  from agent names containing quotes
- Add registration_token authorization to archive_project and
  unarchive_project MCP tools, matching retire/unretire pattern

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -4955,12 +4955,27 @@ async def unretire_agent(
     async def archive_project(
         ctx: Context,
         project_key: str,
+        registration_token: Optional[str] = None,
     ) -> dict[str, Any]:
         """Archive a project (soft-delete). Hides from active lists, preserves all messages."""
         project = await _get_project_by_identifier(project_key)
         if not project:
             raise ValueError(f"Project '{project_key}' not found")
 
+        # Verify caller owns at least one agent in this project
+        async with get_session() as session:
+            agents_result = await session.execute(
+                select(Agent).where(Agent.project_id == project.id, Agent.registration_token.isnot(None))
+            )
+            token_agents = agents_result.scalars().all()
+            if token_agents:
+                if not registration_token or not any(
+                    hmac.compare_digest(registration_token, a.registration_token)
+                    for a in token_agents
+                    if a.registration_token
+                ):
+                    raise ValueError("Invalid registration_token — must match a registered agent in the project")
+
         async with get_session() as session:
             db_project = await session.get(Project, project.id)
             if db_project:
@@ -4983,12 +4998,27 @@ async def archive_project(
     async def unarchive_project(
         ctx: Context,
         project_key: str,
+        registration_token: Optional[str] = None,
     ) -> dict[str, Any]:
         """Restore an archived project back to active status."""
         project = await _get_project_by_identifier(project_key)
         if not project:
             raise ValueError(f"Project '{project_key}' not found")
 
+        # Verify caller owns at least one agent in this project
+        async with get_session() as session:
+            agents_result = await session.execute(
+                select(Agent).where(Agent.project_id == project.id, Agent.registration_token.isnot(None))
+            )
+            token_agents = agents_result.scalars().all()
+            if token_agents:
+                if not registration_token or not any(
+                    hmac.compare_digest(registration_token, a.registration_token)
+                    for a in token_agents
+                    if a.registration_token
+                ):
+                    raise ValueError("Invalid registration_token — must match a registered agent in the project")
+
         async with get_session() as session:
             db_project = await session.get(Project, project.id)
             if db_project:
